textByHashes.9581a8c50285aabb024da9f3a7c9dbd80dad9c33: Certainly sir. Where would you like to go?
textByHashes.aa5cb08a08b65a323d3446dffba4c40eff82dcc5: Certainly madam. Where would you like to go?
textByHashes.f33048b8cd2a490ee42f80d0efedf517e58e6b4d: Certainly. Where would you like to go?
textByHashes.a2c2d34ee3f5ec3101edb6cdb304950631c260c6: Crandor? Are you crazy? No charter ship would take you to that island. You'd need to use your own ship, but even then, you'd need a miracle to find a safe route there!
textByHashes.454ee5049b4e427a0b78b9eb96cfbbc8e1434072: Why, I'm Trader Stan, owner and operator of the largest fleet of trading ships and chartered vessels to ever sail the seas!
textByHashes.abfce556e7481581fa081725fc7e16f0c88c30f2: If you want to get to a port in a hurry then you can charter one of my ships to take you there - if the price is right...
textByHashes.c3b9556a03a3209571dfac5340b3abc51ad62c64: We run ships from Port Phasmatys over to Port Tyras, stopping at Port Sarim, Catherby, Brimhaven, Musa Point, Port Khazard and more besides!
textByHashes.13ad0795c9cee1c04fbab5f12e65971ebca60e3f: We might dock at Mos Le'Harmless once in a while, as well, if you catch my meaning...
textByHashes.3fdc128b052e6bc1fa68cba82708ae1ee8f9be4f: We certainly do! I and my crewmen have access to items bought and sold from around the world. Would you like to take a look? Or would you like to charter a ship?
textByHashes.e5c7bd6401db1610d5f2a8c44bd6a38db7379c6e: Sorry, we can't take you anywhere if you are trying to smuggle that rum.
textByHashes.25bb0f86d18e105aa75fe07a7f5b46220b7f4069: Sorry, we aren't a laundry ship. You'll need to leave those dirty bedsheets behind.
textByHashes.5525b365f7a8c23ac340e030ecf8a4cd00e77339: No, then we would just mock you.
textByHashes.41e5aedd3fa95e50e99442b8098384f94621ae13: Is that your bedsheet covered in filthy slime?
textByHashes.3f01394911b2e3f3cc9446e12605ab497c985c95: Well, whoever it belongs to, it's not coming on this ship!
textByHashes.5f4b1b5810c1e2a04da8521887bd6ebc7eae758f: Why do you want to travel to a port you are already at? Do you want to travel somewhere else?
textByHashes.4f5eb90cd56454bf99cd3bc9230631cd4c98692e: No charter ship would take you to that island. You'd need to buy your own ship and, even then, you'd have trouble finding a captain crazy enough to go there.
textByHashes.f342a8e6072320cc14062a6064d2850172551377: Paint? I suppose I could part with some of my amazing gold Merchant's paint for the right price...
textByHashes.e25ead327f3ff118ff22fe0380d9d4def9315df2: I tell you what, if you bring me 5 different tradeable paints, I'll trade them for a bucket of my Merchant's paint.
textByHashes.d4b477eff0860ff70525cbaeb6b251d3295f1345: Then I suggest you get trading. And don't bother bringing me any paints you can't trade yourself, I can't trade them either!
textByHashes.0b1f479db1ea550c779b2afc0afb6f3e47dd0de1: This is a Sailing Alpha, find out how to get there yourself!
